select_when: The team has a strong thesis and needs a disciplined way to prove it wrong before committing.
Credibility depends on stating what evidence would reverse the recommendation instead of projecting certainty.
The real risk is protecting a belief from challenge rather than discovering whether it survives challenge.
A hypothesis is already guiding analysis, so the next useful move is to define the disconfirming test rather than gather more congenial evidence.
avoid_when: The work is still so vague or underscoped that any initial hypothesis would be decorative rather than testable.
Organizational politics make the hypothesis untouchable, so the language of falsification would only create theater instead of real reversal conditions.

curation_notes.summary: Focused the model on reversal conditions, disconfirming evidence, and test design rather than broad philosophy-of-science framing.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor rhetoric about truth-seeking cultures when the raw source already gives stronger operational testing moves.
Did not add higher-order contracts because this batch keeps Wave 4 observational only.
open_questions: The source is explicit about rigorous testing but less explicit about typed runtime artifacts, so the input and output labels remain reviewed normalization.

select_when.note: The raw file contains explicit activation bullets on thesis testing, credibility, and protected belief; review mainly compacts them into structural triggers.

avoid_when.note: The first condition is explicit in the raw limitations section and the second is a conservative operational compression of the same organizational-resistance warning.

input_type.note: The source is explicit about hypotheses and assertions under challenge, but the compact type label is reviewed operational normalization.

output_type.note: The raw model designs disconfirming tests and reversal thresholds; the output label compresses that into an operational artifact type.

reasoning_types.note: Falsifiability is clearly diagnostic and metacognitive in use, but the taxonomy labels remain reviewed normalization.
